# CANDIDATE: V14E_BULL_VIX_REGIME_GATE

**Filed:** 2026-05-22  
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)  
**Type:** watcher quality gate  
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

The V14E bull branch shows negative P&L across all VIX regimes when deduped (N=181, WR=50.3%, -$1,098). No regime achieves both WR>50% and positive P&L. Therefore, excluding the bull branch in all VIX regimes (i.e., operating bear-only) removes this drag and aligns with the observed edge in bearish setups.

## Mechanism

Gate condition: `V14E_DIRECTION_FILTER = "bear"` (i.e., only allow bearish V14E setups). The watcher `v14_enhanced_watcher` will only record observations when direction=bear. In the engine, the V14E bull branch is suppressed entirely; no entries are allowed for long V14E setups. Exit logic remains unchanged for bear branch.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=28 requires $25K+; $1K paper ~= 14% headline (based on typical entry premium ~$1.00).
2. **Sample bias:** Sample = deduped bull observations from v14_enhanced_watcher (N=181) filtered for direction=long. Selection method: watcher logs all long V14E triggers that pass internal filters. Overfit risk: post-hoc VIX regime splitting increases overfit chance; need OOS validation.
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (walk-forward held-out window not performed).
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (real OPRA fill validation on top 3 J days not performed).
5. **Failure modes:** Worst day: unknown; max drawdown: unknown; blow-up scenario: if bull branch unexpectedly catches a large move, exclusion could miss upside (but historical shows negative edge).
6. **Concentration:** unknown -- requires analysis of top-5 days contribution to P&L.

## Pre-merge gate

Gym validators for watcher logic, walk-forward OOS test, real-fills check on top 3 J days, and verification that gate excludes bull branch in all VIX regimes.

## Confidence

8 / 10 -- Based on deduped watcher stats showing bull branch negative in all VIX regimes; gate mirrors existing V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE which is already PROMISING.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

Complements V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE (same effect). No conflict; essentially duplicates the gate but with explicit VIX conditioning (which is moot as no regime is profitable). If implemented, would replace V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE with a more complex gate that yields same outcome.
